title: Expertise Hours Myth
script_summary: This video debunks the expertise hours myth with scientific insight.

segments.voiceover: What if 10,000 hours of practice isn’t the key to expertise?
The popular myth claims mastery comes from sheer repetition, but science paints a different picture.
Studies show quality of practice matters more than quantity—think deliberate, focused efforts.
Experts recommend feedback and reflection over mindless hours spent grinding.
So, don’t just count the hours—make each one meaningful. That’s the real secret to mastery.
Curious about more myths in learning? Hit like and subscribe!
